plugins.name: safe-fetch
plugins.description: Sanitizing web fetch for Claude Code — strips prompt injection vectors before content reaches the LLM

plugins.name: fakoli-state
plugins.description: Local-first, runtime-neutral project state for humans and AI coding agents — turn PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets.

plugins.name: excalidraw-diagram
plugins.description: Generate and modify Excalidraw diagrams from natural language descriptions and code analysis

plugins.name: marketplace-manager
plugins.description: Manage the fakoli-plugins marketplace: add/remove plugins, validate manifests, and regenerate registry indices

plugins.name: fakoli-crew
plugins.description: Thirteen specialist AI agents for software engineering — 8 generalist roles (polyglot architect, code reviewer, researcher, plugin engineer, integration specialist, documentation writer, infrastructure keeper, QA validator) and 5 cross-plugin critics (agent-critic, skill-critic, hook-critic, mcp-critic, structure-critic) — with TDD enforcement, systematic debugging, and verification gates. Work independently or as coordinated crews for complex projects.

plugins.name: fakoli-flow
plugins.description: Intent-driven workflow orchestration — brainstorm, plan, and execute complex projects through coordinated specialist agents with critic gates and evidence-based verification.

plugins.name: nano-banana-pro
plugins.description: Generate, edit, remix, and optimize images using Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview model

plugins.name: fakoli-speak
plugins.description: Multi-provider TTS for Claude Code — streaming text-to-speech with cost tracking. Supports OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Google Gemini, and macOS Say.

plugins.name: gws
plugins.description: Operate across all Google Workspace services using the gws CLI — 100 skills, 15 slash commands, 11 role-based agents, and 44 automation recipes covering email, calendar, drive, docs, sheets, slides, tasks, chat, meet, forms, classroom, keep, people, events, admin reports, model armor, and apps script.

plugins.name: cli-to-plugin
plugins.description: Convert any CLI tool into a self-contained Claude Code plugin by walking its --help tree and generating one skill per command group, plus optional LLM-proposed workflow meta-skills.

plugins.name: notebooklm-enhanced
plugins.description: Comprehensive Google NotebookLM automation — create notebooks, add sources, generate podcasts/videos/quizzes/slides, and run multi-notebook research workflows via RPC API
